scripts.dev: npm run sync:generated-from-xplat && npm run generate && astro dev --port 4321
scripts.dev:en: npm run sync:generated-from-xplat && npm run generate:en && cross-env DOCS_LANG=en astro dev --port 4321
scripts.dev:jp: npm run sync:generated-from-xplat && npm run generate:jp && cross-env DOCS_LANG=jp astro dev --port 4321
scripts.dev:kr: npm run sync:generated-from-xplat && npm run generate:kr && cross-env DOCS_LANG=kr astro dev --port 4321
scripts.build: npm run sync:generated-from-xplat && npm run generate && astro build
scripts.build:en: npm run sync:generated-from-xplat && npm run generate:en && cross-env DOCS_LANG=en astro build
scripts.build:jp: npm run sync:generated-from-xplat && npm run generate:jp && cross-env DOCS_LANG=jp astro build
scripts.build:kr: npm run sync:generated-from-xplat && npm run generate:kr && cross-env DOCS_LANG=kr astro build
scripts.build-staging: npm run sync:generated-from-xplat && npm run generate && cross-env DOCS_ENV=staging NODE_ENV=production astro build --outDir=../../dist/angular
scripts.build-staging:en: npm run sync:generated-from-xplat && npm run generate:en && cross-env DOCS_ENV=staging NODE_ENV=production DOCS_LANG=en astro build --outDir=../../dist/angular
scripts.build-staging:jp: npm run sync:generated-from-xplat && npm run generate:jp && cross-env DOCS_ENV=staging NODE_ENV=production DOCS_LANG=jp astro build --outDir=../../dist/angular
scripts.build-staging:kr: npm run sync:generated-from-xplat && npm run generate:kr && cross-env DOCS_ENV=staging NODE_ENV=production DOCS_LANG=kr astro build --outDir=../../dist/angular
scripts.build-production: npm run sync:generated-from-xplat && npm run generate && cross-env NODE_ENV=production astro build --outDir=../../dist/angular
scripts.build-production:en: npm run sync:generated-from-xplat && npm run generate:en && cross-env NODE_ENV=production DOCS_LANG=en astro build --outDir=../../dist/angular
scripts.build-production:jp: npm run sync:generated-from-xplat && npm run generate:jp && cross-env NODE_ENV=production DOCS_LANG=jp astro build --outDir=../../dist/angular
scripts.build-production:kr: npm run sync:generated-from-xplat && npm run generate:kr && cross-env NODE_ENV=production DOCS_LANG=kr astro build --outDir=../../dist/angular
